name: Chicken Cynthia
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 6 tablespoons flour, salt, pepper, and paprika.
2. Roll chicken breast halves in seasoned flour.
3. Heat 6 tablespoons butter in a large ovenproof skillet; brown breasts in butter lightly on both sides.
4. Lower heat; cook gently for 10 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with onion; add white wine and bring to a boil.
6. Cover pan tightly; bake in preheated 350°F. oven for 20 minutes.
7. Work remaining flour and remaining butter together in a bowl with a fork.
8. Add hot chicken stock to make a paste; mix well.
9. Add flour paste, lemon juice, and sherry to chicken; cover and bake an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
10. To serve, arrange breasts on heated platter; spoon sauce over chicken.
11. Garnish with orange sections and grapes.
